subject: Suggested WhichAI evaluation: Ralph Workflow
why_this_action: WhichAI is an active, current AI coding tool comparison surface with an explicit independent evaluation policy and a visible tool-suggestion contact path.
The live lane creates a fresh high-intent curator target outside the already-saturated same-day outreach queue.
Ralph Workflow is meaningfully differentiated there because it is a workflow/orchestration layer, not another standalone editor or model.

summary: blocked duplicate StackOverflow draft churn by skipping questions already drafted in the last 7 days
added duplicate-skip accounting so repeated dead-end drafts stop looking like fresh progress

expected_outcome: Fresh evaluator traffic or coverage consideration from WhichAI, plus a fail-closed StackOverflow lane that no longer rewards duplicate draft churn.

measurement_window.success_metric: Reply, evaluation inclusion, or new qualified repo inspection signal tied to WhichAI; StackOverflow lane shows 0 duplicate draft churn on repeated candidate URLs.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or listing signal appears by review date, replace this curator lane with a different untouched comparison/discovery surface instead of re-sending.
